title: FMD - Both earbuds disconnected
scenario: Both earbuds disconnected: Open Lens app settings > Find My Device with Osprey device disconnected and location permission granted, verify Osprey shows 3 disconnected devices (Case, Left, Right) on map while Tern shows 2 earbuds on headset card.
steps: Open Lens app with Osprey device disconnected.
Tap on App Settings icon (hamburger icon).
expected: Osprey device is recognized on the map as 3 devices (Case, Left, Right), all disconnected. Note: Tern device is recognized as 2 devices (no case), only earbuds visible on headset card.
